mission: To share the transformative power of Jesus Christ and build a community of believers who impact the world through love, service, and discipleship.
vision: To see lives transformed by the Gospel of Jesus Christ, creating a movement of passionate believers who serve God and their community with excellence.
aboutText: Welcome to Christ Revolution Ministries, where lives are transformed through the power of God's love. We are a vibrant community of believers committed to sharing the Gospel and making disciples.
heroQuote: "For I am not ashamed of the gospel, because it is the power of God that brings salvation to everyone who believes." - Romans 1:16
